Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to the Kaspersky Security Center console. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to the Kaspersky Security Center administration console on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to the Kaspersky Security Center administration console on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
